rationale: ResolveTierCandidates walks catalog surfaces with overrides layered first; execute-loop and worker iterate candidates recording per-surface rejections; catalog show probes reachability and warns. Unit tests cover AC1/AC5. All five ACs addressed.

findings.summary: Duplicate per-candidate rejection formatter (formatCandidateRejection vs formatTierCandidateRejection) in cmd vs server; fine but ripe to consolidate.
AC5 overrides remain gated behind --override-model in execute-loop (carried over from ddx-87fb72c2); overrides win only when flag is set, otherwise filtered out before catalog candidates.
AC2 (end-to-end fresh-project execute-loop succeeds) is not exercised by an integration test in this diff; relies on commit-message claim and unit coverage.
